name: Edge Runner
title: Edge Runner Design System
concept: Mirror's Edge minimalism translated into a high-contrast interface language.
inspiration: Inspired by Mirror's Edge: white planes, cut geometry, and a disciplined runner-red signal.
summary: Edge Runner is a kinetic near-monochrome system that uses negative space, angular framing, and one decisive accent to make navigation feel fast and precise.
searchText: Edge Runner Mirror's Edge design system runner red sharp geometry minimal monochrome parkour navigation motion
